title: All Product Categories
content:
BOSTER PRODUCT CATEGORIES

Boster Bio provides high quality antibodies, ELISA kits, recombinant proteins, and lab reagents. Use the search bar below to search, click the browse button, or browse by categories.

Primary Antibodies

Boster Bio offers over 16,000 antibodies that have been validated for IHC, WB, ELISA, and FC in human, mouse, and rat samples. Rabbit and mouse monoclonal antibodies as well as rabbit polyclonal antibodies are available.

  • All Primary Antibodies
  • Monoclonal Antibodies
  • Rabbit Monoclonal Antibodies
  • Compound Screening Services

ELISA Kits

More than 1,000 ELISA kits, both singleplex and multiplex, that have been cited 6,000+ times are available at Boster. We offer our Boster-branded Picokine™ ELISA kits (sandwich ELISA) and EZ-Set™ ELISA kits (DIY antibody pairs) in addition to many multiplex ELISA kits.

  • All ELISA Kits
  • Picokine™ ELISA Kits
  • Picokine™ Fast ELISA Kits
  • EZ-Set™ ELISA Kits

  • Multiplex ELISA Solutions

Recombinant Proteins

Boster provides a wide range of human, mouse, and rat recombinant proteins, which include cytokines, growth factors, chemokines, and many more. Our recombinant proteins have high stability, biological activity, and purity.

  • All Recombinant Proteins
  • Human Recombinant Proteins
  • Murine Recombinant Proteins


Secondary Antibodies & Detection Kits

Secondary antibodies for different conjugations (HRP, biotin, FITC, DyLight, etc.) are available for your research. Our SABC and Super Vision detection kits provide specific secondary antibodies along with all the reagents needed to perform IHC and ICC.

  • All Secondary Antibodies
  • Super Vision Detection Kits

  • SABC Detection Kits

Reagents & Kits

Boster offers all the reagents you need for your immunostaining and western blotting experiments. We've got everything from buffers to lysates to kits, including our popular and well-cited BCA, CCK-8, and MTT assay kits.

  • All Reagents and Kits
  • Immunostaining Reagents
  • WB Reagents
  • Cell Lines and Lysates
  • Total Protein Analysis Kits
  • Cell Proliferation & Cytotoxicity
  • Buffers (RIPA, PBS, PFA, etc.)
  • Enzyme Activity Assay Kits
  • Purification Beads
